_comment: Single source of truth for the CVE-2026-54285 (GHSA-8988-4f7v-96qf) OpenTelemetry dependency-range bump. Read by three consumers so they can never drift apart: modules/_pkgs/command-code.nix's postPatch (bumps package.json before npm resolves it into the build), scripts/update-command-code.sh (reapplies the same bump when regenerating the vendored lockfile for a version update), and tests/security/check_command_code_overrides.py (asserts the resolved node_modules tree actually satisfies these floors, not just that package.json claims them). To extend or retire an override, edit this file only -- no script or .nix logic needs to change.
